# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a
  namespace: default
spec:
  identity:
    requireAuthentication: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-allow-service-b
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: service-a
  serverNamespaces:
  - fromNamespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b
  namespace: default
spec:
  identity:
    requireAuthentication: true
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-allow-service-c
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: service-b
  serverNamespaces:
  - fromNamespace: default
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
